title: Indexes, Query Plans, Operator Costs, and Responsible Tuning
description: A growing ticket dataset makes queue and analytics queries slow, but each new index adds write and storage cost. Learners cumulatively produce an evidence-backed query performance dossier through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Explain B-tree and hash-style index strengths, ordering, lookup, storage, and update tradeoffs.
Order composite keys from predicates and sorting needs and identify prefix and covering behavior.
Estimate selectivity and compare scans, seeks, lookups, and join access paths from data distribution.
